# CLKComplicationFamily.modularSmall

**Case**

A small square area that ClockKit displays on the Modular watch face.

## Declaration

```swift
case modularSmall
```

## Discussion

The following figure shows the size and location of the modular small complication.



## Modular

- **CLKComplicationFamily.modularLarge**: A large rectangular area that ClockKit displays on the Modular watch face.
